---
title: "Reference"
description: "Every component and workflow across the OpenPipeline ecosystem."
toc: false
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: ref
    type: table
    contents:
      - "openpipeline/**/*.qmd"
      - "openpipeline_spatial/**/*.qmd"
      - "openpipeline_qc/**/*.qmd"
      - "openpipeline_rapids/**/*.qmd"
      - "openpipeline_composed/**/*.qmd"
    include:
      latest: "true"
    fields: [title, package, type, namespace, description]
    field-display-names:
      title: "Name"
      package: "Package"
      type: "Type"
      namespace: "Namespace"
      description: "Description"
    sort: "title"
    filter-ui: false
    sort-ui: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="ref-controls">
  <span class="ref-controls-label">Filter</span>
  <label class="ref-field">
    <span class="ref-field-label">Package</span>
    <select class="ref-pkg-select">
      <option value="">All packages</option>
      <option value="openpipeline">openpipeline</option>
      <option value="openpipeline_spatial">openpipeline_spatial</option>
      <option value="openpipeline_qc">openpipeline_qc</option>
      <option value="openpipeline_composed">openpipeline_composed</option>
    </select>
  </label>
  <label class="ref-field">
    <span class="ref-field-label">Type</span>
    <select class="ref-type-select">
      <option value="workflow" selected>Workflows</option>
      <option value="module">Modules</option>
      <option value="">Modules &amp; workflows</option>
    </select>
  </label>
  <input type="search" class="ref-search" placeholder="Search" aria-label="Search components">
</div>
```

:::{#ref}
:::

```{=html}
<script>
(function () {
  var listing = document.getElementById("listing-ref");
  if (!listing) return;
  var rows = Array.prototype.slice.call(listing.querySelectorAll("tbody tr"));
  var pkgSel = document.querySelector(".ref-pkg-select");
  var typeSel = document.querySelector(".ref-type-select");
  var search = document.querySelector(".ref-search");
  var count = document.querySelector(".ref-count");
  function txt(row, cls) { var e = row.querySelector(cls); return e ? e.textContent.trim() : ""; }
  function apply() {
    var p = pkgSel.value, t = typeSel.value, q = (search.value || "").trim().toLowerCase(), shown = 0;
    rows.forEach(function (r) {
      var okPkg = !p || txt(r, ".listing-package") === p;
      var okType = !t || txt(r, ".listing-type") === t;
      var hay = (txt(r, ".listing-title") + " " + txt(r, ".listing-namespace") + " " + txt(r, ".listing-description")).toLowerCase();
      var okQ = !q || hay.indexOf(q) !== -1;
      var show = okPkg && okType && okQ;
      r.style.display = show ? "" : "none";
      if (show) shown++;
    });
    if (count) count.textContent = shown + " component" + (shown === 1 ? "" : "s");
  }
  pkgSel.addEventListener("change", apply);
  typeSel.addEventListener("change", apply);
  search.addEventListener("input", apply);
  apply();
})();
</script>
```

::: {.ref-count-wrap}
[]{.ref-count}
:::
